sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT, name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'HR');
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Engineering');
SELECT department, listagg(name, ', ') AS employee_names FROM employees GROUP BY department;
UPDATE employees SET department = 'Marketing' WHERE id = 2;
